comment.body:
You only need Alma's daily input for the mean reversion one . The other two work fine without any input. For example Alma's script correctly printed a sell signal at Spy 640 pre market and also was outside the bands. When 2 indicators signal the same thing probability increases. Also same indicator flipped to Long at 11:45PT at 635 and price started to rise. Extremity of the bands is easy to play. Similar to bollinger bands but with slightly modified stats. 

This is the shortest explanation I can think of. Alma or other experts might be able to give you a more thorough explanation.
